summary: Landing Page V2 - All tests passed. 8 sections verified: Hero, Problem, Solution, Features, Testimonials, Stats, Urgency (countdown timer), Final CTA. All CTAs navigate to /signup correctly. Mobile responsive at 375px. All images load successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: LandingPageV2.tsx: Well-structured with 8 distinct sections as required
CountdownTimer.tsx: Properly updates every second using setInterval
Sticky nav has glass effect (backdrop-blur-xl) on scroll
Stats section uses IntersectionObserver for animated counters
Beta end date persisted in localStorage key 'kolor_beta_end'
All data-testid attributes present for testing
Mobile responsive with proper Tailwind breakpoints (lg:, md:, sm:)
seed_data_creation: None - Landing page is purely frontend
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page V2 is fully functional. All 8 sections render correctly. Countdown timer updates every second. All CTA buttons navigate to /signup. Login/signup pages are accessible. No broken images.

Landing_Page_Loads.details: Landing page loads at / route without errors

Hero_Section_Headline.details: Headline 'Stop Losing Clients to Messy Workflows' visible

Hero_CTA_Navigation.details: 'Start Free Trial' primary CTA button navigates to /signup

Sticky_Nav_Glass_Effect.details: Sticky nav appears on scroll with glass effect (backdrop-blur-xl)

Problem_Section_Pain_Points.details: 5 pain points with red X icons visible

Solution_Section_Steps.details: 3 numbered step cards (Capture, Quote, Book) visible

Features_Section_Grid.details: 6 feature cards in grid layout visible

Testimonials_Section.details: 6 testimonial cards with star ratings visible

Stats_Section_Counters.details: 4 stat cards with animated counters visible (78%, 10 hrs, 2 min, $4,000+)

Urgency_Section_Countdown.details: Countdown timer with days/hours/min/sec updating every second

Urgency_CTA_Navigation.details: 'Claim Your Free Account' CTA navigates to /signup

Final_CTA_Navigation.details: 'Start Your Free Account' button navigates to /signup

Footer_Content.details: Copyright text (2026) and links (Privacy, Terms, Contact) visible

Mobile_Responsive.details: All sections stack properly at 375px width

Auth_Flow_Accessible.details: /login page accessible with email, password fields and Remember Me checkbox
